name: Romanian Eggplant Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tsp sea salt, or more to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast each eggplant, turning frequently, over a flame or under a broiler until the skin is charred all over, 20 to 25 minutes.
2. Using a sharp knife, peel the eggplants and rinse thoroughly under cold water.
3. Quarter the eggplants lengthwise and discard as many seeds as possible.
4. Toss with 1 tsp sea salt, then place the eggplants in a stainless-steel or other non-reactive container and squeeze out as much water as possible using paper towels.
5. Cut the eggplant flesh into 1 1/2 inch cubes.
6. Place the cut eggplant in a glass or ceramic bowl and, stirring continuously with a wooden spoon, slowly add the safflower and olive oils and remaining 1/2 tsp sea salt.
7. Stirring, add the milk.
8. Spread out the eggplant on a large plate and using a fork, score parallel lines on the surface.
9. Garnish with the tomato slices and olives.
10. Serve the chopped onion on the side. Makes about 2 1/2 cups, serves 4 to 6.
